title: lycopodium lucidulum var. verum
intro: Lycopodium lucidulum var. verum, also known as Spike Club Moss, is a species of plant that belongs to the genus Lycopodium, a group of ancient, non-vascular plants that are part of the lycopodiophyta phylum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium lucidulum var. verum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-aging and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
